pytorch.reason: Core computation: trajectory evolution, density matrix averaging, Lindblad exact solution

amplitude_damping_from_excited.explanation: From |1>, sigma_- can only jump once to |0>, then L|0>=0

single_trajectory_large_error.explanation: A single trajectory is a pure state -- cannot match mixed rho

wrong_jump_operator.explanation: sigma_plus on |1> does nothing (L|1>=0 for sigma_plus), so state stays |1>

large_dt_breaks_approximation.explanation: First-order expansion requires dt*gamma << 1; here dt*gamma=5

ground_state_stationary.explanation: sigma_- |0> = 0, so no jumps and no evolution

zero_gamma_no_decay.explanation: gamma=0 means L=0, no dissipation, state unchanged

long_time_reaches_steady_state.explanation: After t >> 1/gamma, system fully decays to |0>
